definition.policy: exclude weak_or_grindy_continuation + pre-entry breakout quality gate

diagnostic_leakage.point_in_time_basis: stage2 feature_cutoff_time per candidate; labels and PnL used only after feature/state assignment for diagnostics

policy_gate_leakage.point_in_time_basis: pre-entry gates use feature_cutoff_time features; delayed follow-through variant is evaluated as a delayed-entry policy with fill impact
